meaning: adj.可穿用的,可佩带的,耐磨的n.衣服
examples: His clothes are comfortable and wearable.
It's not only wearable and foldable, but also washable.
Separately, the environmental organization Greenpeace is running a workshop on how to turn worn-out clothing into something new and wearable.
The reality is that complex wearable computers still seem very far off from mass market consumption.
Even companies that few would consider high-tech were eager to plant a flag in wearable computing.
